test-method.name: testCareerJourney
test-method.description: Navigate through Tenforce career pages and verify job openings text

exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (750, 579). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.81) Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [591523eaa137db400cf495116dc5d131, clickElement {id=f.B53450564A2B9E4F4C8FF1298AD7540F.d.874BF098BAADE6582931AB8FDE5C1E51.e.21}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.81, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\admin\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62366}, goog:processID: 9384, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62366/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.81, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (591523eaa137db400cf495116dc5d131)] -> partial link text: Career] Session ID: 591523eaa137db400cf495116dc5d131
